## Description
Brief description of the change.

## Related issue
Fixes # (if applicable)

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New modeling pattern / feature
- [ ] Documentation / example improvement
- [ ] Fidelity / test improvement (paper law)
- [ ] Other

## Checklist (required before merge)
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `ruff format --check .` passes
- [ ] `mypy src --strict` passes
- [ ] `pytest -q` passes
- [ ] All promoted examples and notebooks still run with a single `python` command from a fresh clone (bootstrap guards intact)
- [ ] Added or updated at least one worked example / notebook (for new modeling patterns)
- [ ] Updated CHANGELOG.md (if user-facing)
- [ ] Updated relevant docs (README, ARCHITECTURE, etc.) if behavior or scope changed
- [ ] New diagram artifacts (if any) are either generated by code or clearly documented as manual

## Notes for reviewers
Especially welcome: feedback from categorical semantics or formal methods researchers on fidelity.
